description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a vibrant blue mesh upper with black and neon yellow accents. The shoe displays a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, with the brand name also visible on the tongue. The lacing system uses neon yellow eyelets in a zigzag pattern, adding both visual interest and functional support. The midsole is white with a black heel section, and the outsole has hints of neon green at the toe. The heel and collar are padded for comfort, and the overall design is streamlined for performance and style. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic mesh, rubber, foam, and textile.
description: A blue and black Nike running shoe with neon yellow laces, white Swoosh logos, and a cushioned sole designed for athletic use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue mesh upper, neon yellow lacing, and large white Nike Swoosh logo.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black padded heel, mesh ventilation, and white midsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another white Nike Swoosh and visible neon yellow lace loops.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the blue mesh toe box, neon yellow laces, and Nike logo on the tongue.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides, white Nike text on blue tongue label
